Deterministic: ()
()]
  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (match &hald1000 
      (Doxorubicin $p $o) 
      (Doxorubicin $p $o)) 
    ( (Doxorubicin stratify Liposarcoma) (Doxorubicin associated MIR375)))

[

;
;; METTA-WAM-ISSUE-116.TEST-SPO-1000.01

; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.000843 secs. (842.93 microseconds) 

  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (match &hald1000 
      (Doxorubicin $p $o) 
      (Doxorubicin $p $o)) 
    ( (Doxorubicin stratify Liposarcoma) (Doxorubicin associated MIR375)))

  (loonit_success  
    (equal_enough_for_test  
      ( (Doxorubicin stratify Liposarcoma) (Doxorubicin associated MIR375)) 
      ( (Doxorubicin stratify Liposarcoma) (Doxorubicin associated MIR375))))


  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_6010))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (match &hald1000 
            (Doxorubicin $_3870 $_3888) 
            (Doxorubicin $_3870 $_3888)) 
          ( (Doxorubicin stratify Liposarcoma) (Doxorubicin associated MIR375))) $_3590) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_4114) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3590 $_4142) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3310) $_4142)))))




  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_6010))

          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3310) $_4142)))))
